title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
summary: MCP tools can return data alongside bundled HTML resources that VS Code renders in sandboxed iframes within chat windows. The UI maintains live bidirectional communication with a backend server to fetch updated data and render interactive visualizations like flame graphs, checkout flows, and architecture diagrams without exposing system access.
